data.title: Spot gold hits record high, breaking through $3,585
data.description: Market data showed that the spot gold price rose to $3,585, setting a new record high.

data.title: US labor market plunges again as unemployment surges to 4.3%
data.description:
The labor market slipped deeper into trouble in August. Only 22,000 jobs were added last month, way below the 75,000 economists expected. And unemployment shot up to 4. 3%, according to the Bureau of Labor Statistics. This slowdown piles on to earlier weak reports and makes a rate cut by the Fed almost a done deal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-labor-market-plunges-again/

data.title: Why is verification harder on OnlyFans than crypto exchanges?
data.description:
OnlyFans and Pornhub creator accounts may be harder to secure than a crypto account, but stricter hurdles don’t always mean stronger KYC.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/verification-harder-onlyfans-crypto-exchanges?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Belarus Develops Cryptocurrency Regulations Amid Industry Growth
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Belarusian President Aleksandr Lukashenko has directed lawmakers to establish clear and transparent regulations for the country's burgeoning cryptocurrency market. During a recent government conference, Lukashenko emphasized the importance of Belarus staying abreast of global trends in digital finance. He stated that the state's role is to define understandable rules and control mechanisms for this emerging sector, highlighting its novelty for Belarus.

Lukashenko referenced his previous directives from 2023, which aimed at comprehensive regulation of digital tokens and cryptocurrencies. This initiative was encapsulated in the Belarusian Presidential Decree No. 80, which sought to develop a national framework for cryptocurrency. The president underscored the necessity of delineating the responsibilities of government agencies and the government-supported IT special economic zone, Hi-Tech Park, within the crypto industry. His remarks follow earlier instructions to the energy minister to explore the potential of cryptocurrency mining, leveraging Belarus's surplus electricity.

Despite Belarus's apparent interest in cryptocurrency, the nation has shown resistance to its decentralized nature. In mid-2023, the Belarusian Ministry proposed legal amendments to restrict peer-to-peer cryptocurrency transactions, such as those involving Bitcoin. This intention was formalized last year when Lukashenko signed Decree No. 367, which prohibits individuals, including entrepreneurs residing in Hi-Tech Park, from engaging in cryptocurrency transactions outside Belarusian exchanges. The decree aims to maintain state oversight over digital assets, promoting a controlled and transparent circulation of digital tokens, primarily cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Non-farm payrolls confirm a weakening job market, setting the stage for a Fed rate cut this month
data.description: U.S. job growth slowed sharply in August, with the unemployment rate rising to 4.3%, confirming weakening labor market conditions and setting the stage for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this month. The U.S. Department of Labor's Bureau of Labor Statistics' employment report released Friday showed that nonfarm payrolls increased by only 22,000 in August, compared with expectations for a 75,000 increase and following an upwardly revised 79,000 increase in July. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. unemployment rate hit 4.3% in August
data.description: The U.S. unemployment rate was 4.3% in August, compared to 4.2% in the previous month and the expected 4.30%. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. non-farm payrolls for June and July were revised down by a combined 21,000
data.description: The latest revised data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics shows that June's non-farm payrolls were revised down by 27,000 from 14,000 to -13,000, while July's payrolls were revised up by 6,000 from 73,000 to 79,000. Overall, the combined payroll figures for June and July were revised down by 21,000 from the previous figures. (Jinshi)

data.title: SharpLink Complies with Nasdaq Rules for Potential ETH Purchases
data.description: According to PANews, SharpLink has announced its full compliance with Nasdaq regulations, indicating that if the company decides to initiate an ATM program for purchasing Ethereum (ETH), no additional shareholder approval will be required. The company emphasized that it will only raise capital when it can enhance shareholder value, while maintaining a commitment to compliance and transparency.

data.title: Pineapple Financial Launches INJ-Based Asset Management Strategy
data.description:
According to Foresight News, fintech platform Pineapple Financial, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker PAPL, has successfully raised $100 million in a private placement. The company is initiating a digital asset management strategy anchored by Injective's native asset, INJ.

Pineapple Financial anticipates that the INJ-based strategy will yield approximately 12% in passive returns, positioning it among the higher levels within major blockchain networks. By focusing on an INJ-prioritized approach, Pineapple is aligning its asset management efforts to explore how blockchain-based assets can drive broader developments in the financial industry.

data.title: The US non-farm payrolls for August were 75,000
data.description: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls for August in the United States were 75,000, compared to 79,000 in the previous month and 75,000 in the previous month. (Jinshi)

data.title: SEC and CFTC to Host Joint Roundtable on Regulatory Coordination
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) have announced a joint roundtable meeting scheduled for September 29. The meeting aims to discuss topics such as regulatory coordination, the unification of product and venue definitions, simplification of data standards, and innovation exemptions.

The event will be open to the public and will be streamed live on the SEC's official website. This initiative reflects the agencies' efforts to enhance collaboration and streamline regulatory processes in the financial sector.

data.title: U.S. Regulators Consider Introducing Perpetual Contracts to Domestic Market
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. regulators, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), are contemplating measures to introduce perpetual contracts into the domestic compliant market. Currently, these contracts are predominantly traded in offshore crypto markets due to regulatory and definitional constraints in the United States. If implemented, the new regulations would permit perpetual contracts that meet investor protection and risk management standards to be listed on trading platforms under SEC and CFTC oversight. This move aims to reduce capital outflow to overseas platforms and provide U.S. traders with products featuring transparent leverage limits and robust risk management.

data.title: Yunfeng Financial appoints Liang Xinjun as independent non-executive director
data.description: Yunfeng Financial (00376.HK) announced that Liang Xinjun will serve as the company's independent non-executive director, effective September 5, 2025. Liang Xinjun, currently Chairman and CEO of Xin Family Office and former co-founder of Fosun Group, has extensive investment experience in Web3 blockchain, artificial intelligence, and the metaverse. Earlier news: Yunfeng Financial, in which Jack Ma indirectly holds a stake, has purchased 10,000 ETH, totaling $44 million. Recommended reading: Entering Ethereum: Is Jack Ma's Web3 strategy just beginning?

data.title: An Ethena-associated address transferred 11 million ENA to Binance within a week and currently holds 351 million ENA.
data.description: Four hours ago, address 0x878 (owned by Ethena) transferred 5 million ENA (approximately $3.27 million) to Binance. Over the past week, this address has received a total of 11 million ENA (approximately $7.24 million). Currently, its wallet holds approximately 351 million ENA, worth approximately $229 million. (The Data Nerd)

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Black Mirror (MIRROR)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Black Mirror (MIRROR) on September 8, 2025.Eligible users can claim their airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens and further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Dollar dips ahead of non-farm payroll report
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) fell 12 points in the short term, currently at 97.9. USD/JPY fell below 148, down 0.32% on the day. EUR/USD rose above 1.17, up 0.45% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's September Rate Cut Likely, CME Data Shows
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 0% probability of the Federal Reserve maintaining its current interest rates in September. Instead, there is an 88.3% likelihood of a 25 basis point rate cut and an 11.7% chance of a 50 basis point reduction. Prior to the data release, the probability of a rate cut was 0%. Looking ahead to October, there is a 0.4% chance of rates remaining unchanged, a 36.2% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point cut, and a 63.4% likelihood of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 113,000 USDT with a 2.29% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 05, 2025, 12:55 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 113,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 113,299.992188 USDT, with a narrowed 2.29% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Commerzbank: Tonight's US non-farm payroll figures will show whether data collection is influenced by politics
data.description: Thu Lan Nguyen, head of foreign exchange and commodity research at Commerzbank, pointed out that there is another point to note about today's non-farm payroll data: weak employment growth will not only have an impact on US monetary policy, but will also reveal whether the "dismissal of the head of the department responsible for statistics" has affected data collection. Commerzbank's US experts have warned that the annual benchmark revision data will be released on September 9th - this revision caused the employment data to be significantly revised downward last year. They also found that the actual employment dynamics may be weaker than the data previously released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. From this perspective, the US dollar faces significant resistance, as the (weak) data may inject new impetus into speculation about interest rate cuts. On the contrary, given the current political pressure, caution should be exercised if the report is unexpectedly strong. (Golden Ten)

data.title: U.S. August Employment Figures Fall Short of Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States reported an increase of 22,000 in seasonally adjusted non-farm employment for August, significantly below the anticipated 75,000. This data reflects a slower pace of job growth than expected.
